title: Endorsements
subtitle: Show the skills you can offer and see the endorsements members have shared.
skillsIntro: Keep your profile skills current so neighbours can find the help you offer.
endorsementsIntro: Endorsements from other members help the community understand your strengths.

discover.noMembers: No members found for this skill yet.
